testCases.title: Verify login page loads successfully
steps: Open the application URL in a browser
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads successfully and username textbox, password textbox, login button, and error message area are visible

testCases.title: Verify successful login with valid username and password
steps: Enter valid username 'haklarr' in username textbox
Enter valid password 'Icstunnel1' in password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: User lands on home page http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify login fails with incorrect username and correct password
steps: Enter invalid username 'wronguser' in username textbox
Enter valid password 'Icstunnel1' in password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and error message is displayed in error message area

testCases.title: Verify login fails with correct username and incorrect password
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and appropriate error message is displayed

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are incorrect
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and error message appears in error message area

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username and password fields are blank
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and validation or error message is displayed

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username is blank and password is filled
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and validation message is displayed

testCases.title: Verify login fails when password is blank and username is filled
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and validation message is displayed

testCases.title: Verify username textbox accepts alphanumeric input
steps: Enter alphanumeric value 'user123' in username textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Username textbox accepts the input without UI issues

testCases.title: Verify password textbox masks entered characters
testCases.expectedResult: Entered password characters are masked

testCases.title: Verify login button is clickable
testCases.expectedResult: Login button responds to click and triggers login validation

testCases.title: Verify error message appears in error message area on failed login
testCases.expectedResult: Error message is displayed in error message area

testCases.title: Verify login with username containing leading and trailing spaces
testCases.expectedResult: System trims spaces or handles them appropriately and processes login

testCases.title: Verify login with password containing leading and trailing spaces
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails or system correctly handles spaces according to authentication rules

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with very long username input
steps: Enter a username exceeding typical length limit (e.g., 200 characters)
testCases.expectedResult: System prevents invalid input or displays validation error without UI break

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with very long password input
steps: Enter password longer than expected limit (e.g., 200 characters)
testCases.expectedResult: System handles long input gracefully and displays login failure if credentials invalid

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username contains only whitespace
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and validation message is displayed

testCases.title: Verify login fails when password contains only whitespace
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and validation message is displayed

testCases.title: Verify login using copy paste for username and password
steps: Copy 'haklarr' and paste into username textbox
Copy 'Icstunnel1' and paste into password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login succeeds and user lands on home page

testCases.title: Verify multiple rapid clicks on login button
steps: Rapidly click login button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: System processes login once and navigates to home page without duplicate requests or errors
